.config [dir]
.config/demo [dir]
.config/demo/shared.conf -> <REPO>/demo/work/shared.conf
.config/easyrice [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs/easyrice.log [file]
.config/easyrice/repos [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo/common [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo/common/shared.conf [file]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo/work [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo/work/shared.conf [file]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/rice.toml [file]
